title: The Cat Walk charity fun run is around the corner
description: GEORGE NEWS - Animal lovers, get ready to...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Animal lovers, get ready to hit the trails! Vetcare Animal Clinic’s third annual charity fun run, The Cat Walk, takes place on Saturday 6 September at the Garden Route Botanical Garden.


> Registration opens at 13:00 at the garden gate, with the run starting at 14:00.


Entry costs just R50 per person, with all proceeds going towards helping animals in need. Pets are welcome too – as long as they’re kept on a leash.

Alongside the run, there will be lucky draws, prizes in different categories, and a limited number of stalls available for those who want to showcase or sell goods.

Stall spaces cost R150 each, but with only 30 spots on offer, early booking is recommended.Event at a glance:Date: Saturday, 6 SeptemberVenue: Botanical Garden Gate, GeorgeRegistration: 13:00 | Start: 14:00Entry fee: R50 per personStalls: R150 (30 available)For stall bookings or more information, contact Vetcare Animal Clinic on 044 873 3585 or [email protected]

Let’s walk together for a cause that makes every stride count.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
